CodePad main.rs

Files

  • lib.rs
  • Cargo.toml
  • README.md
fn main() {
    println!("Hello, world!");
    let x = fibonacci(10);
    println!("fib(10) = {}", x);
}

fn fibonacci(n: u32) -> u32 {
    match n {
        0 => 0,
        1 => 1,
        _ => fibonacci(n - 1) + fibonacci(n - 2),
    }
}

Output

Hello, world!
fib(10) = 55
[Process completed in 0.12s]
